description: Configuration schema for image-generation models served by stable-diffusion.cpp

name.description: Name of the model (the API model id and the SD_CPP_MODEL label; not a cache directory)

components.description: Weight files that make up the model, stored in the shared cache at <repository>/<file>

role.description: Role of the component in stable-diffusion.cpp

repository.description: Hugging Face repository containing the file

file.description: Path of the file inside the repository

args.description: Extra sd-server flags applied when this model is loaded (e.g. sampling tuning such as --flow-shift)

title: Image Models Configuration
